summary:
The provided evidence shows no association between MAIT cells and multiple myeloma, both in terms of direct studies or reported functions within tumor microenvironments. Due to their primary presence in mucosal tissues and absence from referenced research related to MM biology, MAIT cells do not play a recognized role in the disease. 

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
